description: New function compute_unused_metric has zero callers across the codebase (born dead). graph-signals Step-10 introducedDeadCode flags it; if the symbol's edges resolve EXTRACTED/INFERRED it feeds the slopDelta dead-code floor (S5), if only AMBIGUOUS it is advisory-only and routed to cross-file-impact. Lint (ruff/eslint) cannot see this — it is unused ACROSS files, not within one. Full assertion needs the graph + API-gated /pr-review runner; structural-only here.
